purpose: Declarative MAS-native medical figure grammar that binds a paper figure intent to a Display Template and explicit medical semantics.
machine_boundary: The enforceable validator lives in med_autoscience.medical_figure_spec_contract. This JSON file indexes the stable figure_spec surface, required fields, supported semantics, and authority boundary for agents and contract readers.

paper_surface.name: medical_figure_spec
paper_surface.authority_boundary: Declarative medical figure grammar only; it binds figure intent, Display Template, and medical semantics without rendering figures, changing data/statistics, or issuing publication readiness verdicts.

figure_intent.relationship: figure_spec references the paper figure intent entry; it does not replace figure_intent.

display_template.relationship: figure_spec binds the selected Display Template to MAS medical semantics without becoming a Vega-Lite runtime or external renderer.
